creator: amzo1337@gmail.com
text: I think really what is needed is a USES case for bazel. As for tensorflow. I moved to the latest version but I still need to ship with it a bazelrc to set the repository for downloads as local to prevent bazel downloading sources.I don't think this is an issue for the maintainer and more of the ports. As I moved to the latest version of tensorflow the I no longer need an older version of bazel. I will close this bug.
